creator: contact@evilham.com
text:
(In reply to Mina Galić from comment #2)
Possibly, but I truly don't like the idea of reinforcing GH's position, it's nice that people can add patches using it if they want to though.

Ideally those checks could be triggered on reviews.freebsd.org, and there are many other nuances, but the gist is: wherever I can, I avoid GitHub, and it would truly sadden me to be forced into using it to contribute to FreeBSD.
